claim.statement: Every 2-coloring of the edges of the complete graph K9 contains a red triangle (K3) or a blue K4 (Ramsey R(3,4) <= 9).
claim.negation_of: an edge 2-coloring of K9 with no red K3 and no blue K4

meta.note: same checker, different combinatorial family -- the checker only ever sees a CNF + certificate

encoder.variable_scheme: lexicographic edge variables; positive literal means red

one_directional: The Lean-proved checker can never falsely certify a parsed CNF as UNSAT; a solver/toolchain/parser bug only causes a refusal. The atlas binds bytes by sha256, cross-checks parsed counts, and regenerates the Ramsey edge-coloring CNF from the declared encoder spec to require an exact formula match; tampering or encoder drift fails closed.
